name: Arrow creation
description: Creating arrows with optional shape bindings

scenarios.description: Arrow created without binding to any shape

events.arrow.pointing.started: Arrow tool pointer down at ({{origin.x}}, {{origin.y}}), kind: {{arrow.kind}}, precise: {{is.precise}}

scenarios.description: Arrow bound to at least one shape

events.arrow.pointing.started: Arrow tool pointer down at ({{origin.x}}, {{origin.y}}), target: {{target.shape.id}}, kind: {{arrow.kind}}
events.arrow.binding.created: Binding {{binding.id}}: bound {{terminal}} of {{arrow.id}} to {{target.type}} {{target.id}} via {{snap.type}}, precise: {{is.precise}}

events.arrow.pointing.started: Arrow tool pointer down at ({{origin.x}}, {{origin.y}}), kind: {{arrow.kind}}
